jdbc_password.description: Specifies the password used to authenticate with the PostgreSQL catalog
jdbc_password.title: JDBC Password

jdbc_url.description: Specifies the JDBC URL used to connect to the PostgreSQL catalog
jdbc_url.title: JDBC URL

jdbc_username.description: Specifies the username used to authenticate with the PostgreSQL catalog
jdbc_username.title: JDBC Username

s3_endpoint.description: Specifies the endpoint URL for S3 compatible services (e.g., MinIO)
s3_endpoint.title: S3 Endpoint

s3_path_style.description: Specifies whether path-style access is used for S3; 'true' enables path-style addressing instead of the default virtual-hosted style
s3_path_style.title: Use Path Style for S3

s3_use_ssl.description: Boolean flag indicating whether to use SSL when connecting to S3
s3_use_ssl.title: Use SSL for S3

hive_clients.description: Specifies the number of Hive clients allocated to handle interactions with the Hive Metastore
hive_clients.title: Hive Clients

hive_sasl_enabled.description: Indicates if SASL authentication is enabled for the Hive connection; 'false' means SASL is disabled
hive_sasl_enabled.title: Enable SASL for Hive

hive_uri.description: Specifies the URI of the Hive Metastore service used for catalog interactions by the writer
hive_uri.title: Hive URI

s3_endpoint.description: Specifies the endpoint URL for S3 compatible services (e.g., MinIO)
s3_endpoint.title: S3 Endpoint

s3_path_style.description: Enables path-style addressing for S3 API requests
s3_path_style.title: Use Path Style for S3

s3_use_ssl.description: Boolean flag indicating whether to use SSL when connecting to S3
s3_use_ssl.title: Use SSL for S3

credential.description: Client secret or credential for OAuth2 (Usually id:secret)
credential.title: REST Credential

no_identifier_fields.description: To create iceberg table without identifier fields. (Unity catalog only support tables with no identifier)
no_identifier_fields.title: Disable Identifier Field For Tables

oauth2_uri.description: OAuth2 server URI for OAuth2 authentication
oauth2_uri.title: REST Auth URI

rest_catalog_url.description: Specifies the endpoint URI for the REST catalog service the writer will connect to
rest_catalog_url.title: REST Catalog URI

rest_signing_name.description: Service name for AWS Signature V4 (e.g., 's3tables')
rest_signing_name.title: REST Signing Name

rest_signing_region.description: Region for AWS Signature V4 signing
rest_signing_region.title: REST Signing Region

s3_endpoint.description: Specifies the endpoint URL for S3 compatible services (e.g., MinIO)
s3_endpoint.title: S3 Endpoint

glue_access_key.description: Access key for authenticating Glue catalog requests, required when Glue credentials differ from S3 credentials
glue_access_key.title: Glue Access Key

glue_catalog_id.description: AWS account ID used as the Glue Data Catalog identifier
glue_catalog_id.title: Glue Catalog ID

glue_endpoint.description: Custom endpoint URL for AWS Glue or a Glue-compatible catalog service
glue_endpoint.title: Glue Endpoint

glue_region.description: AWS region for the Glue catalog, if different from the S3 region. Falls back to AWS Region if not set
glue_region.title: Glue Region

glue_secret_key.description: Secret key for authenticating Glue catalog requests, required when Glue credentials differ from S3 credentials
glue_secret_key.title: Glue Secret Key

glue_additional_config.description: Enable separate credentials (access key and secret key), endpoint, and region for the Glue catalog
glue_additional_config.title: Custom Glue Endpoint Configuration

s3_endpoint.description: Specifies the endpoint URL for S3 compatible services
s3_endpoint.title: S3 Endpoint

arrow_writes.description: Enable Apache Arrow-based Writer for Iceberg
arrow_writes.title: Enable Arrow Writes

aws_access_key.description: The AWS access key for authenticating S3 requests, typically a 20-character alphanumeric string
aws_access_key.title: AWS Access Key

aws_region.description: Specify the AWS region where the S3 bucket is hosted
aws_region.title: AWS Region

aws_secret_key.description: The AWS secret key for S3 authentication—typically 40+ characters long
aws_secret_key.title: AWS Secret Key

catalog_name.description: User defined catalog name, if left blank defaults to olake_iceberg. Only lowercase letters and underscores are allowed.
catalog_name.title: Catalog Name

iceberg_s3_path.description: The S3 path or storage location for Iceberg data
iceberg_s3_path.title: S3 Path
